brand.name: Forever Fortified
brand.intro: Forever Fortified helps homeowners improve, protect, and refresh their homes with roofing, siding, gutters, and bathroom remodel services designed for long-term value.

heroCopyOptions.label: Stronger Home
heroCopyOptions.headline: Make your home stronger, cleaner, and ready for what is next.
heroCopyOptions.intro: Forever Fortified brings honest guidance, clean craftsmanship, and durable material choices to every project, so your home looks sharp and holds strong long after the work is done.

heroCopyOptions.label: Built to Hold Up
heroCopyOptions.headline: Refresh your home with work built to hold up.
heroCopyOptions.intro: Start with the roof, siding, gutters, or bathroom that needs attention most, then get clear recommendations and careful work from the first walkthrough to the final cleanup.

heroCopyOptions.label: Lasting Confidence
heroCopyOptions.headline: Bring lasting confidence back to your home.
heroCopyOptions.intro: When something feels worn, leaking, dated, or overdue, get a clear plan for improving it with durable materials, steady communication, and work that respects your home.

serviceArea.summary: Serving Minnesota homeowners with roofing, siding, gutters, and bathroom remodel services.
